form.formComment: Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 435m at Sale behind Hay Riley beaten 1.1 lengths (24.68). More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished 3rd in a Grade 5 on April 5 over 435m at Sale behind Hay Riley beaten 1.1 lengths (24.68). More than capable and well placed to find his best form.

form.formComment: Didn't make the placings last time at Healesville (19.77) in a Free For All, finishing a 10 length seventh. Box stats strong with five wins and four placings from 12 starts. Among the main chances.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Didn't make the placings last time at Healesville (19.77) in a Free For All, finishing a 10 length seventh. Box stats strong with five wins and four placings from 12 starts. Among the main chances.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.80, beating Flaming Fox. Last start finished last on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Elite Intention beaten 8 lengths (26.61) in a Grade 4/5. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by 0.8 lengths in 22.80, beating Flaming Fox. Last start finished last on April 10 over 460m at this track behind Elite Intention beaten 8 lengths (26.61) in a Grade 4/5. Not going well enough. Needs to lift.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Quick to begin; Contacted on first turn and lost ground.
Checked and fell turning off back straight.

form.formComment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording seven placings in a row, before finishing fourth (29.07) at Sale last start. Has a squeeze box to navigate and will need to find best.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Had been racing in honest fashion, recording seven placings in a row, before finishing fourth (29.07) at Sale last start. Has a squeeze box to navigate and will need to find best.

form.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 3 length fourth (26.24) over 460m at this track. Others favoured this time.

form.formComment: Most recent effort finished last in a Free For All on April 12 over 435m at Sale behind Daddy Cool beaten 9 lengths (25.11). Capable of taking this out.

formComments.comment: Most recent effort finished last in a Free For All on April 12 over 435m at Sale behind Daddy Cool beaten 9 lengths (25.11). Capable of taking this out.

form.formComment: Won two starts back when well in the market at this track over 460m. Last start finished last on April 10 over 460m at Geelong behind Not Again beaten 15 lengths (26.63) in a Restricted WIN H. Tipped to improve sharply. Rates highly on best form.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Slow to begin; Checked and fell approaching home turn.

form.formComment: Caught the eye with a fast early split and setting up a 0.8 lengths win at Sandown over 515m in 29.44. Expected to measure up again.
